features: GENEROUS SIZE: Each package includes 1 large gift bag , 1 pcs gift tag and 1 pcs tie. The giant plastic gift bag measures 48 x 36 inches, perfect for wrapping big or clumsily shaped gifts.
PREMIUM QUALITY: This colorful jumbo plastic gift bag is made from durable material. It's thick, sturdy, reusable and completely opaque, ensuring your large gifts remain a surprise.

CONVENIENT GIFT TAGS & ROPES:The extra large size birthday gift bag thoughtfully comes with a gift tag and string. The tag allows you to write down the recipient's name easily, and the string tie makes the package more beautifully simple and clutter-free.

FUN BALLOON BIRTHDAY DESIGN: Featuring a vibrant balloon and confetti pattern and a unique “HAPPY Birthday” design, this xl birthday gift bag is perfect for kids' birthday parties. Its cheerful and festive design is great for boys and girls, making it a hit at any children’s birthday celebration.

PERFECT FOR LARGE OR CLUMSY SHAPED GIFTS: Ideal for huge, giant, or uniquely shaped gifts that are tough to wrap with traditional wrapping paper. This bag is much cuter than a plain garbage bag, and you'll love its festive look. Perfect for huge,XL,or big gifts.It can also be used as a gift bag, wrapping bag, storage bag, luggage gift bag,and more.
description: Product Description Big Eye Owl Our big gift bags have cool designs and are made really well, so they'll make your presents look awesome.Whether you need bags for birthdays, weddings, Christmas, or anything else, Big Eye Owl has the perfect gift wrap to make your gifts look the best! SPECIFICATIONS: Material: Plastic Color: Colorful balloons with "HAPPY Birthday" design Size: 36*48 Inch Shape: Rectangle PACKAGE INCLUDES: 1 pcs 36*48 inch large birthday gift bag 1 pcs gift tag 1 pcs string COLORFUL BALLOONS "HAPPY BIRTHDAY" THEME PARTY This large birthday gift bag is decked out with colorful design - vibrant balloons floating amidst a shower of party confetti, all with a "HAPPY Birthday" message. Perfect for adding a touch of celebration to any kid's birthday festivities! At a jumbo 36"x48" size, this oversized gift bag offers ample room to accommodate all sorts of birthday presents,from toys to apparel and beyond.Crafted from durable yet lightweight plastic, it's both practical , allowing for easy reuse. This high quality birthday gift bag is practical and beautiful.Whether you need to wrap a large gift or add a unique style to your birthday theme party, this “HAPPY Birthday” birthday gift bag is perfect for you!
